items.title: Get 20,100mAh support for devices from Anker’s Prime 220W 3-port power bank while down at $126 (Reg. $180), more
items.summary:
Anker’s official Amazon storefront is offering its Prime 20,100mAh 3-Port 220W Power Bank down at a Prime-exclusive $125.99 shipped, which matches the price we’re seeing from its direct website. It’s down from a full $180 price tag here, which matches the same rate we spotted it at during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale in the final week of March. While we did see it fall lower to $120 during Black Friday sales, that rate hasn’t appeared again since, making today’s deal the next-best option with the 30% markdown that cuts $54 off the tag for the second-lowest price we have tracked. If you’d prefer a smaller Anker charging solution, you can also find the Nano 45W 10000mAh Power Bank down at $46, while the 240W 8-in-1 Prime Charging Station is back down at $100.

items.title: Microsoft’s executive shake-up continues as developer division chief resigns
items.summary: Microsoft is losing another veteran executive. Julia Liuson, head of Microsoft's developer division (DevDiv), is resigning from the software giant after 34 years. Liuson spent the past 12 years leading Microsoft's developer business, during a period Microsoft focused more on open-source projects and acquired GitHub for $7.5 billion. Liuson will continue as head of DevDiv […]

items.title: EcoFlow’s Earth Day Mega Sale offers up to 62% power station discounts, bonus savings, more – all starting from $169
items.summary:
EcoFlow has launched its Members’ Festival x Earth Day Mega Sale with up to 62% discounts, member-only deals (sign-up is free), 3x EcoCredit rewards, and plenty of free gifts. One notable members-only bundles is the DELTA 3 Ultra Plus Portable Power Station with a FREE Power Hat at $1,449 shipped, which matches in price at Amazon without getting the Power Hat. This unit on its own normally goes for $2,899 at full price, which has consistently been keeping down between $1,499 and $1,449 since 2026 began. While we’ve only seen this rate beaten by one-time falls to $1,424 during Black Friday and the $1,399 low during January’s Winter Storm Sale, making this the next-best price with $1,450 slashed from its tag – plus, you’re getting the $99 Power Hat totally free for $1,549 in total savings. Head below to learn more about it, get the rundown on all the extra savings opportunities, and browse the full sale lineup.
